LanguageData.Shell_Smoke_Dummy.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.

LanguageData.Shell_Foam_Dummy.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.

LanguageData.Shell_EMP_Dummy.description: Low-velocity shell designed to be fired from a mortar.
